_meta.keyKnowledge: We experiment with visual conventions, processes and materials to develop skills and personal expression for creating artworks that communicate ideas.

_source.w: We experiment with visual conventions, processes and materials to develop skills and personal expression for creating artworks that communicate ideas.
y: Experimentation at this level is purposeful and directed toward developing our personal artistic practice.
Pushing technical boundaries leads to innovation and the discovery of new forms of expression.
Developing personal expression through experimentation is how we find our unique artistic voice.
eg: We experiment with unconventional materials, techniques or combinations to develop new approaches.
We push the boundaries of our chosen medium through sustained experimentation.
We develop specialised skills in specific art forms or techniques through focused practice.
We use experimentation to develop and refine our personal artistic style.
We document our experiments and analyse how they inform our resolved artworks.
We take creative risks that lead to new discoveries and artistic growth.
